androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar.app:title: L U M E N I Z E

TextView.android:text: Send to Wallet Address or @username instantly
Share balance to anyone with a unique link
Transactions are settled on Stellar Testnet
Enter your Secret Key\nto restore your account.
Send only Stellar assets (XLM, USDC) to this address.
Funds will be settled on Stellar Network
Save your Secret Key safely.\nAnyone with this key can access your funds.

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: I have saved my secret key securely.
